# Global Career ID

> Global Career ID is a verified employment identity platform. Job seekers build a single trusted, employer-verified career record (a Career ID) that recruiters and employers can verify instantly — replacing easily-faked CVs and reference letters.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the verified Career ID platform.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough for job seekers and employers.
- [For employers and recruiters](/for-employers): Verify candidates, post jobs, and reduce hiring fraud.
- [For job seekers](/for-job-seekers): Build a verified career identity you control.
- [Verify a profile](/verify): Look up and verify any Career ID.
- [Verify a credential](/verify-credential): Cryptographically verify a signed credential.
- [About](/about): Mission and team behind Global Career ID.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles at Global Career ID.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about the platform.
- [Help center](/help): Guides and support resources.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Global Career ID team.
- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How data is handled.
- [Terms of service](/terms): Platform terms.
